column2: Including yourself, how many people currently live in your household full-time( Marka lagu daro naftaada, imisa qof ayaa hadda ku nool gurigaaga wakhti buuxa)
column3: How many people living in your household are under 18 years old? ( Immisa qof oo ku nool gurigaaga ayaa ka yar 18 jir? )
column4: How many smartphones are regularly used by members of your household? (Immisa taleefan oo casriga ah ayaa xubnaha qoyskaagu si joogto ah u isticmaalaan?)
column5: Which of the following best describes the primary income source or working style of the main earner(s) in the household?  ( Kuwan soo socda kee baa sida ugu wanaagsan u qeexaya isha dakhliga ama qaabka shaqo ee dadka dakhliga ugu muhiimsan ee qoyska?)
column6: Does your household own a gaming console (e.g., PlayStation, Xbox, Nintendo Switch) ( Reerkaagu miyuu leeyahay qalabka ciyaarta lagu ciyaaro ( tusaale, PlayStation, Xbox, Nintendo Switch)
column7: On a typical weekday, what is the combined total number of hours everyone in your household spends using digital screens for leisure or entertainment? (  Maalmaha shaqada ee caadiga ah, waa imisa isku geynta tirada saacadaha qof kasta oo qoyskaaga ka tirsan uu isticmaalo shashadaha dhijitaalka ah ee xilliga firaaqada ama madadaalada?)
